merged_events.event_description: Ambassador Melissa F. Wells presented credentials to the government of Cape Verde but was resident at Bissau (Guinea-Bissau), establishing nonresident ambassadorial relations.

evidence.quote: Ambassador Melissa F. Wells presented her credentials to the government of Cape Verde on November 18, 1976. Wells also was accredited to Guinea-Bissau and was resident at Bissau.

merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy at Praia was established, elevating U.S. representation from a nonresident ambassadorship to a resident embassy.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy at Praia was established on January 28, 1978, with Howard McGowan as Charge d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact date and status match. Both refer to Ambassador Melissa F. Wells presenting credentials on 1976-11-18, resident at Bissau (Guinea-Bissau).
Exact date and status match. Both refer to the establishment of the American Embassy at Praia on 1978-01-28.
